prestazioni: Engine swap to a **F6A turbocharged** (657cc, DOHC 12V, 64PS stock) with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (GT1241Z, 0.35 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** to prevent compressor surge under aggressive gear shifts.

Full **TODA Racing F6A forged internals** kit (85mm forged pistons, H-beam connecting rods, billet crankshaft) with **ARP head studs** and **Cometic MLS head gasket** to handle 1.5 bar of boost, targeting 150PS at the wheels.

Custom **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with **AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor** and **Denso Iridium IK22 spark plugs** for precise ignition timing, paired with a **SARD fuel pressure regulator** and **Walbro 255LPH in-tank fuel pump** to support E85 flex-fuel tuning.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Every/Kei-style widebody kit** (FRP construction, bolt-on fender flares, and custom rear diffuser) with **JDM-spec Suzuki Sport badging** and **Rays Gram Lights 57DR 13x4.5 ET+38 wheels** (155/65R13 Federal 595 RS-R tires).
**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (vented, with integrated heat extraction ducts) and **C-West front lip spoiler** (polyurethane, bolt-on for lowered ride height) to reduce lift at high speeds.

**Bride Zeta III Kei-car seats** (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with **Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses**, paired with a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (suede, 6-bolt pattern) and **Defi BF Silver gauges** (boost, oil temp, fuel pressure) mounted on a **Sparco carbon fiber A-pillar pod**.
